sql_array: CREATE TABLE example_map (id UInt32, mappings Map(String, UInt32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE example_map SET mappings = map('key1', 30, 'key2', mappings['key2']) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, mappings['key1'] AS key1_value, mappings['key2'] AS key2_value FROM example_map;
SELECT map('k1', sum(number), 'k2', count()) FROM numbers(5) GROUP BY number;
